businessDescription: Winsome designs and installs custom window blinds and insect screen systems for apartments, houses, offices, and commercial spaces in Tbilisi and across Georgia.
tagline: Locally made blinds and protective insect screens for modern spaces.

defaultSeo.defaultTitle: Window Blinds and Insect Screens in Tbilisi | Winsome

homeIntro.title: The right catalog of blinds and insect screens for Georgia
homeIntro.description: Choose the right system for your space—from pleated to vertical, roller blinds to insect screens. Every product is made to measure and installed on site.

whyChooseUs.title: Local manufacturing
whyChooseUs.description: Production in Georgia means flexible timelines, better communication, and a tighter fit for every project.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean installation
whyChooseUs.description: Each installation is planned to protect your interior and deliver a neat, finished result.

whyChooseUs.title: Real variety
whyChooseUs.description: Our range combines fabric blinds, slat systems, and insect screens for windows, balcony doors, and high-traffic openings.

whyChooseUs.title: Precise fit
whyChooseUs.description: Every system is built for the exact window, door, opening, or profile—not pulled from a generic catalog size.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We select the right system, material, color, and usage scenario for each room or opening.

process.title: Measuring
process.description: We take accurate on-site measurements and confirm installation details before production.

process.title: Production
process.description: Your chosen fabric, mechanism, mesh, and profile are produced locally.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We complete a clean install, test operation, and share care tips.

homeFaqs.question: Do you manufacture blinds locally in Georgia?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. Winsome is positioned as a local manufacturer in Tbilisi, which allows for a more precise fit, flexible timelines, and better control over the final quality. Production reflects the specifics of the Georgian market, and our local approach lets us respond quickly to individual requests. We serve Tbilisi, Batumi, Kutaisi, Rustavi, Gori, and other cities across Georgia.

homeFaqs.question: Do you help choose fabric, slat, or mesh systems?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. During consultation we review room type, light intensity, privacy needs, profile color, and the system that will be most practical for each opening. For example, a bedroom may benefit from blackout fabric, while a kitchen may need a moisture-resistant, easy-to-clean option. Consultation is free—you can reach us by phone or WhatsApp.

homeFaqs.question: Do you offer measuring and installation?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. The full process includes consultation, on-site measuring, custom production, and professional installation. Measuring is done on site so every detail—including opening shape, profile type, and installation space—is accounted for. After installation we check system operation and provide care recommendations.

story: Winsome is built around a local Georgian brand idea: calm design, precise fit, and a high-quality finished result.
The brand balances practicality and premium aesthetics, so the products work well in apartments, offices, hospitality spaces, and on actively used doors and windows.

values.title: Attention to detail
values.description: A careful, precise approach from consultation through final installation.

values.title: Practical aesthetics
values.description: Products are chosen for visual calm as well as light, air, privacy, and protection.

values.title: Flexible customization
values.description: Fabric, color, mechanism, profile, and size are chosen for the specific project—not a one-size standard scheme.
